l as Amrta Ghatis. Generally their duration is of four Ghatis
or I hr. 36 mt„ provided the constellation is of 60 Ghati-duration.
If it exceeds or is short of that, proper change will have to be
made. In the almanac a certain number of Ghatis is given against
Amrta and Visa. It means that the Visa or Amrta period starts
from that Ghati. Lor the commencement of these two periods of
each asterism please refer to page SO supra. In the opinion of
authors of works on Muhurta the Amrta Ghati period is highly
prized in spite of some blemishes. Hence in urgent circumstances
Amrta Ghati is to be sought for. Similarly no Muhurta is pre-
scribed during the Visa period by any astrologer.
In modern society man has to face many a challenge; In the
matter of admission to school and college, in submitting appli-
cations for jobs, for starting to take competitive examination, or
appearing before a committee of interviewers, or going on a
journey, one is naturally very apprehensive about the result.
